strengths: ~19 years of hands-on engineering across web, embedded, low-latency backend, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and still runs GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic-workflow frameworks) plus public talks and workshops showing knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms — AI exposure is limited to ~1 year of recent agent tooling work
Career has stayed at senior/staff IC level on product teams; no evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer advisory, or org-wide technical leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field (preferred), and cloud experience (AWS CDK, k8s) is practitioner-level rather than platform-strategy depth

key_factors.factor: Absence of demonstrated AI products or recognized AI expertise
No director-level scope or strategic advisory experience
Experience minimum met with strong builder fluency and founder experience

response.justification: The role's core competencies are recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products, cloud platform strategy, director-level influence, and entrepreneurial drive. The candidate clearly meets the experience minimum (employment history from 2006) and shows entrepreneurial credentials (GISCollective founder) and emerging AI relevance (MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq since 2025). However, the résumé shows no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of the strategic, customer-facing, organization-shaping scope expected of a director-level principal engineer — roles have been senior/staff IC delivery positions. Strong generalist engineer, but the two highest-weight competencies for this specific role are not evidenced.
